prompt: Give me a short pep talk before I start a hard task I have been putting off all morning.
response: Hey there! I know you’ve been putting this off, but let’s flip the script. Think about how amazing it will feel to cross this off your list! You’ve tackled tough challenges before, and you can absolutely do it again. Break it down into smaller steps if you need to, and remember, progress is progress, no matter how small. Take a deep breath, focus on just getting started, and the momentum will carry you forward. You’ve got this! Now go knock it out of the park! 📈💪
